title: What's new: Mar 26th - May 3rd

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s been a while since our last round-up of changes to the API, apps framework, and marketplace…but we’re back with many new and improved features! Check them out below

API

2024-07

  • Bug fix: Changes to ComplexityException error reverted

2024-04

  • New app_subscription_operations query and mutation
  • New ability to create a doc column
  • Bug fix: Date column filtering with multiple exact dates
  • Bug fix: Changes to ComplexityException error reverted

2024-01

  • Bug fix: Changes to ComplexityException error reverted

Apps

  • New SDK method to open app rating popup
  • Important updates to workspace templates board permissions
  • New self-service requests to update your app listing page
  • Updated sales and app analytics widgets
  • New monday code alerts
